title: Voritor lizard
content:
{{Top|leg}} {{Species |image=[[File:Voritor_lizard.jpg]] |name=Voritor lizard |designation=[[Sentience/Legends|Non-sentient]]{{GalaxiesAED}} |class=[[Reptile/Legends|Reptile]]''[[Star Wars Galaxies: The Ruins of Dantooine]]'' |subspecies= |races=Horned voritor{{CSWECite|II|60|horned voritor}} |height= |length=2 [[Meter/Legends|meters]] |wingspan= |mass= |skincolor= |haircolor= |feathers= |eyecolor= |distinctions=*Dorsal spine *[[Poison/Legends|Poisonous]]{{SWGTCG|set=Champions of the Force (SWGTCG)|cardname=Voritor Lizard}} |lifespan= |origin=*[[Dantooine/Legends|Dantooine]] *[[Dathomir/Legends|Dathomir]]''[[Book of Sith: Secrets from the Dark Side]]'' |habitat= |diet=[[Diet/Legends|Carnivorous]]{{SWGcite|exp=AED|type=loading|Voritor|Dantooine}} |language= }} {{Quote|Our blasters just weren't bringing the voritor down. They're notorious for incredibly tough hides.|[[Dusque Mistflier]], to [[Finn Darktrin]]|}} A '''voritor lizard''' was an aggressive, venomous [[Reptile/Legends|reptilian]] creature commonly found on [[Dantooine/Legends|Dantooine]]. ==Description== {{Quote|In fact, no one is even sure how long these creatures live. It could be hundreds, maybe even thousands of years.|Dusque Mistflier, to Finn Darktrin|}} The voritor lizard was a [[Reptile/Legends|reptilian]] species native to Dantooine, although it could also be found on [[Dathomir/Legends|Dathomir]]. The average voritor was two [[Meter/Legends|meters]] long, with a fan-like dorsal spike. The beast was a solitary hunter of the plains of Dantooine that moved slowly until they come in for the kill. When one decided to attack, it charged its target with incredible speed. [[Bol]]s were its favorite preys.{{SWGcite|exp=AED|type=loading|Bol|Dantooine}} The voritor lizard was a venomous predator with tough hide resistant to [[Blaster/Legends|blaster]] shots. A race of voritor lizard, horned voritor, had pointed scales protecting its [[Eye/Legends|eyes]] and [[Ear/Legends|ears]]. ==History== {{Quote|You could have gotten us killed.''"
"''What? I thought the lizard was about to do that for sure.|Dusque Mistflier and Finn Darktrin|}} [[File:Sister_of_the_Voritor.png|thumb|left|200px|A [[Sister of the Voritor]] with her pet.]] On Dathomir, wild voritors were tamed by [[Nightsisters/Legends|Nightsister]]. Those [[Sister of the Voritor|Sisters of the Voritor]] used the beasts to guard the borders of the Nightsister territory. In [[1 ABY/Legends|1 ABY]], [[Dusque Mistflier]] and [[Finn Darktrin]] were attacked by a voritor lizard on Dantooine. Dusque was forced to use a [[Thermal detonator/Legends|thermal detonator]] to kill the beast to save her life. Following the [[Battle of Yavin/Legends|Battle of Yavin]], the [[Rodian/Legends|Rodian]] [[Hunting/Legends|hunter]] [[Qakkee]] tasked a spacer to kill six voritor lizards on Dantooine and brought him back their horns.{{SWGcite|exp=RotW|type=general|The great hunter, phase III|Tatooine}} Around the same time, the collector [[Jener Mich]] tasked a group of spacers to hunt and kill an unreasonable number of voritor lizards on Dantooine.{{SWGcite|exp=NGE|type=collection|Voritor Killer}} ==Behind the scenes== [[File:Voritor_lizard_concept_art.jpg|thumb|right|220px|Concept art for ''[[Star Wars Galaxies]]''.]] Voritor lizards appeared in the [[2003]] [[Star Wars video games|video game]] ''[[Star Wars Galaxies]]'', a massively multiplayer online role-playing game developed by [[Sony]] Online Entertainment and published by [[LucasArts]], prior to its closure on [[December 15]], [[2011]].{{SonyCite|url=playerinfo|text=IMPORTANT INFORMATION ABOUT ''STAR WARS'' GALAXIES™}} In ''Star Wars Galaxies'', all voritor variants, including the horned voritor, were exclusively present on the planet Dantooine. However, the ''[[The Complete Star Wars Encyclopedia]]'' incorrectly stated that the horned voritor was native to Dathomir. The presence of voritor lizards on Dathomir was later validated in the reference book ''[[Book of Sith: Secrets from the Dark Side]]''. ==Appearances== *''[[Star Wars: The Old Republic: Legacy of the Sith]]'' {{Mo}} *''[[Star Wars Galaxies: The Ruins of Dantooine]]'' *{{GalaxiesAED}} {{1st}} *''[[Star Wars Galaxies: Rage of the Wookiees]]'' *{{GalaxiesNGE}} ==Sources== {{Mediacat|imagecat=Images of voritor lizards}} *''[[From Pencil to Pixel: The Art of Star Wars Galaxies]]'' *[[Star Wars Galaxies: The Total Experience: Prima Official Game Guide|''Star Wars Galaxies: The Total Experience'': Prima Official Game Guide]] *[[Star Wars Galaxies: The Complete Guide: Prima Official Game Guide|''Star Wars Galaxies: The Complete Guide'': Prima Official Game Guide]] *[[Star Wars Galaxies Bonus DVD|''Star Wars Galaxies'' Bonus DVD]] *{{SWGTCG|set=Champions of the Force|cardname=Voritor Lizard}} *''[[The Complete Star Wars Encyclopedia]]'' *''[[Book of Sith: Secrets from the Dark Side]]'' ==Notes and references== {{Reflist}} ==External links== *{{SWGWiki|Voritor}} [[Category:Carnivorous creatures]] [[Category:Creatures of Dantooine]] [[Category:Creatures of Dathomir]] [[Category:Domesticated creatures]] [[Category:Lizards]] [[Category:Non-sentient species]] [[Category:Predatory creatures]] [[Category:Venomous and poisonous creatures]]
